---
name: documents/docs.cloud.google.com/iam/docs/roles-permissions/jobfunctions
uri: https://docs.cloud.google.com/iam/docs/roles-permissions/jobfunctions
title: Roles for job functions
description: Fine-grained access control and visibility for centrally managing cloud resources.
data_source: docs.cloud.google.com
---

This page lists the predefined roles that are designed to be granted to users with specific job functions in Google Cloud. For more information about who these roles are intended for, see [Predefined roles for job functions](https://docs.cloud.google.com/iam/docs/job-functions/roles-for-job-functions) .

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr class="header">
<th>Role</th>
<th>Permissions</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr class="odd">
<td><h4 id="iam.dataScientist" class="role-title add-link" data-text="Data Scientist" tabindex="-1">Data Scientist</h4>
<p>( <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/  iam.dataScientist</code> )</p>
<p>Designed for a data scientist power user to manage data platform services and associated Compute services for analyzing data and building data processing, transformation and analysis pipelines.</p></td>

<tr class="odd">
<td><h4 id="iam.mlEngineer" class="role-title add-link" data-text="ML Engineer" tabindex="-1">ML Engineer</h4>
<p>( <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/  iam.mlEngineer</code> )</p>
<p>Enables an ML engineer as a power user for using GCP for building and deploying AI based applications.</p></td>

<tr class="even">
<td><h4 id="iam.networkAdmin" class="role-title add-link" data-text="Network Administrator" tabindex="-1">Network Administrator</h4>
<p>( <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/  iam.networkAdmin</code> )</p>
<p>Designed for a Network Administrator to manage Network and related GCP resources, create customized monitoring, and viewing configurations</p></td>

<td><h4 id="iam.siteReliabilityEngineer" class="role-title add-link" data-text="Site Reliability Engineer" tabindex="-1">Site Reliability Engineer</h4>
<p>( <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/  iam.siteReliabilityEngineer</code> )</p>
<p>Enables operational monitoring, performance optimization and reliability management of applications built on GCP.</p></td>

<tr class="odd">
<td><h4 id="iam.supportUser" class="role-title add-link" data-text="Support User" tabindex="-1">Support User</h4>
<p>( <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/  iam.supportUser</code> )</p>
<p>Provide a user the ability to create and manage support cases in their own enterprise by viewing their GCP resource configurations, monitoring and logging information that may be needed for providing required information to GCP support.</p></td>
